description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and lint, and define the variables EXTDIR, PGDATA, PGPASSWORD, PGUSER, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, POSTGRES_USER, and PSQL. Add a manual job named demo in the test stage that uses the default image, runs before_script commands: mkdir -p $PGDATA, mkdir -p $EXTDIR, chown postgres $PGDATA, gosu postgres initdb, gosu postgres pg_ctl start; then runs script commands: apt-get update, apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends make gcc postgresql-server-dev-13 postgresql-contrib-13 pgxnclient, make extension, make install, psql -c "ALTER SYSTEM SET session_preload_libraries = 'anon'", psql -c "SELECT pg_reload_conf();", make demo. The demo job stores artifacts matching demo/*.out for 1 day. Add a lint-markdown job in the lint stage using the ruby:alpine image that runs gem install mdl and mdl docs/*.md *.md. No services, caches, or additional deployment targets are defined.
